title: Convert Text List to YAML Sequence
cap_description: Convert a list of textable values to a YAML sequence
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a plain text list into a YAML sequence. Use this when a downstream cap or configuration file expects YAML but the upstream produces a list of text values.

## Inputs

A list of textable string values.

## Outputs

A YAML sequence of strings.

## Notes

- Each item in the list becomes one element in the YAML sequence.
- For JSON array output, use [Convert Text List to JSON Array](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:list;textable";op=convert_format;out="media:json;list;textable").
- For the reverse, use [Convert YAML Sequence to Text List](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:list;textable;yaml";op=convert_format;out="media:list;textable").

args.arg_description: List of textable values to convert
